files.patch:
@@ -1,11 +1,11 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-browser-core"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.2.9"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "WASM/JS bindings for the Asupersync async runtime (Browser Edition). Exposes the v1 ABI symbol surface via wasm-bindgen."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
-keywords = ["async", "wasm", "browser", "bindings", "structured-concurrency"]
+keywords = ["async", "wasm", "browser", "bindings", "structured"]
 categories = ["asynchronous", "wasm", "web-programming"]
 
 [package.metadata.asupersync_wasm_policy]
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 
 [dependencies]
 # Core Asupersync runtime (no wasm-bindgen in core paths).
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", path = "..", default-features = false }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.9", path = "..", default-features = false }
 
 # WASM boundary tooling.
 wasm-bindgen = "0.2"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-macros"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Proc macros for asupersync structured concurrency runtime"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-tokio-compat"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.2.9"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Compatibility bridge for running Tokio-locked crates within the Asupersync async runtime."
@@ -10,14 +10,14 @@ categories = ["asynchronous", "network-programming"]
 
 [package.metadata.asupersync_compat_policy]
 policy_version = "1.0.0"
-compatibility_line = "0.1.x"
+compatibility_line = "0.2.x"
 release_train = "tokio-compat"
 owner_track = "asupersync-2oh2u.7"
 exception_review = "threaded-agent-mail"
 
 [dependencies]
 # Core Asupersync runtime (no Tokio in core paths).
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", path = ".." }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.9", path = ".." }
 
 # Tokio sync primitives and I/O traits — does NOT require a running Tokio runtime.
 # Used for trait implementations and type bridging.
@@ -64,5 +64,5 @@ must_use_candidate = "allow"
 missing_panics_doc = "allow"
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", path = "..", features = ["test-internals"] }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.9", path = "..", features = ["test-internals"] }
 futures-lite = "2"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-conformance"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 edition = "2024"
 description = "Conformance test suite for async runtime specifications"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"

@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-decision"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Decision Contract schema and runtime for FrankenSuite."
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync"
 keywords = ["decision", "contract", "bayesian", "loss-matrix"]
 
 [dependencies]
-franken-kernel = { version = "0.2.8", path = "../franken_kernel" }
-franken-evidence = { version = "0.2.8", path = "../franken_evidence" }
+franken-kernel = { version = "0.2.9", path = "../franken_kernel" }
+franken-evidence = { version = "0.2.9", path = "../franken_evidence" }
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-evidence"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Canonical EvidenceLedger schema for FrankenSuite decision tracing."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "franken-kernel"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Suite-wide type substrate for FrankenSuite: TraceId, DecisionId, PolicyId, SchemaVersion."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankenlab"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../LICENSE"
 description = "Deterministic testing harness for async Rust: record, replay, and minimize concurrency bugs."
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ name = "frankenlab"
 path = "src/main.rs"
 
 [dependencies]
-asupersync = { version = "0.2.8", path = "..", features = ["cli", "test-internals"] }
+asupersync = { version = "0.2.9", path = "..", features = ["cli", "test-internals"] }
 clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive"] }
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"
